prose: **Pyridine frontier-orbital gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fit) in PySCF, **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: provided from `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/pyridine/pyridine.xyz`; the DFT was a single point on this provided geometry. SCF converged in 10 cycles. HOMO = −7.2526 eV, LUMO = −1.1128 eV → **gap = 6.1398 eV** (Koopmans-style orbital gap, not an excitation energy).
